auth.checkEmail: Check your email for the magic link!

auth.completeDobFirst: Please complete the date of birth step first
auth.resetLinkExpired: This password reset link is expired or invalid.

auth.needSignedIn: You need to be signed in to manage notifications.

settings.title: Settings
settings.description: Manage invites, subscriptions, and organization access
settings.requireApprovalDesc: When enabled, users who join via invite must be approved before gaining access. You can also override this per invite.

orgName.title: Organization name
orgName.adminOnly: Only admins can change the organization name.

branding.title: Organization branding
branding.description: Upload a logo and set the colors used across your org experience.
branding.primaryHint: Buttons and highlights will use this color.
branding.secondaryHint: Accent surfaces and pills pull from this color.
branding.adminOnly: Only admins can change branding. Ask an admin to update colors or the logo.

notifications.title: Notification preferences
notifications.description: Applies only to {orgName}. Customize how you get alerts.
notifications.turnOnOff: Turn emails on or off for this org.

storage.title: Media storage usage
storage.description: Storage consumed by gallery items and feature uploads.
storage.quotaExceeded: Storage quota exceeded. Consider removing unused media or upgrading your plan.
storage.approachingLimit: Approaching storage limit. Consider removing unused media or upgrading your plan.

billing.title: Billing Management
billing.description: Manage payment methods, view invoices, or update your subscription.

dangerZone.title: Danger Zone
dangerZone.description: These actions can affect your organization's access and data.

cancelSub.title: Cancel Subscription
cancelSub.description: Your subscription will remain active until the end of your billing period. After that, you'll have 30 days of read-only access to resubscribe.
cancelSub.confirmPrompt:
Are you sure you want to cancel your subscription?

Your subscription will remain active until {periodEnd}. After that, you'll have 30 days of read-only access before the organization is deleted.

You can resubscribe anytime during this period.
cancelSub.cancelledAlert:
Your subscription has been cancelled.

You will have access until {endDate}, followed by 30 days of read-only access.

You can resubscribe anytime to keep your organization.

deleteOrg.title: Delete Organization
deleteOrg.description: Permanently delete this organization and all its data. This action cannot be undone.
deleteOrg.confirmDesc: This will permanently delete {orgName} and all associated data including:
deleteOrg.deleted: Your organization has been deleted and your payments have been ended.
deleteOrg.warningPrompt:
WARNING: You are about to permanently delete this organization.

All data including members, alumni, events, records, and files will be lost forever.

This action CANNOT be undone.

Are you sure you want to continue?
deleteOrg.typeError: Please type "{orgName}" or "{orgSlug}" to confirm deletion.

membership.title: Access control
membership.description: Manage roles and access for members of this org.
membership.confirmAdminDesc: You are about to promote {name} to Admin.

subscription.title: Subscription & Alumni Quota
subscription.description: Alumni additions are capped by your current plan. Upgrade to add more alumni.
subscription.planLimitReached: Alumni limit reached. Upgrade to add more alumni.
subscription.downgradeDisabled: Downgrades are disabled if your alumni count exceeds the plan limit.
subscription.selectPlan: Select a plan and click Update to start billing checkout.

connectedAccounts.title: Connected Accounts
connectedAccounts.description: Manage your LinkedIn connection and other linked accounts.
connectedAccounts.googleCalDesc: Google Calendar sync is managed per-organization from the Calendar settings within each org you belong to.

userNotifications.title: Notifications
userNotifications.description: Choose how you want to receive email notifications for each organization.
userNotifications.calendarSyncDesc: Google Calendar sync is managed per-organization in the Schedules section.
userNotifications.emailNotificationsDesc: Configure email notification preferences for each organization.
userNotifications.joinOrgDesc: You will see notification options for each organization you belong to.
userNotifications.controlUpdates: Control how you get updates from this org.
userNotifications.accountEmailsDesc: Critical account and billing emails always go to your account email.

navigation.title: Navigation
navigation.description: Items are organized in sidebar sections. Rename items, adjust visibility, or reorder within each section.

analytics.title: Usage Analytics (Admin)
analytics.descOff: Usage analytics are unavailable for this account under the current compliance rules.
analytics.descPageViews: Control your personal analytics consent for this organization. Your account or organization is limited to page-level analytics even when you opt in.
analytics.descOptedIn: You have opted in to expanded analytics. Your profile and engagement patterns may be used to personalize your experience.
analytics.descOptedOut: You have opted out of expanded analytics. Only anonymous page-view data is collected for this organization.
analytics.descDefault: Control your personal analytics consent for this organization. Behavioral analytics are disabled by default until you opt in.
analytics.toggleOn: Disable page-view analytics for this org
analytics.toggleOff: Enable page-view analytics for this org

navigation.updated: Navigation updated. Refresh the sidebar to see your changes.

approvals.title: Pending Approvals
approvals.description: Review and approve pending membership requests
approvals.allCaughtUp: All caught up! No pending approvals.
approvals.confirmReject: Are you sure you want to reject this request? This will remove the user.

adoptionRequest.title: Adoption Request
adoptionRequest.benefit1: Your organization will become part of the enterprise
adoptionRequest.benefit2: Billing will transfer to the enterprise (you won't pay separately)
adoptionRequest.benefit3: Alumni counts will be pooled with the enterprise quota
adoptionRequest.benefit4: Your organization will retain all its settings and data
adoptionRequest.accepted: Adoption request accepted! Your organization is now part of the enterprise.
adoptionRequest.confirmReject: Are you sure you want to reject this adoption request?

settings.pendingApprovalsCount: {count, plural, =0 {No pending approvals} one {# pending approval} other {# pending approvals}}

customization.description: Update your org brand and notifications in one place.

timezone.adminOnly: Only admins can change the timezone.

googleCalendar.title: Google Calendar Sync
googleCalendar.description: Manage your Google Calendar connection and sync preferences in the Calendar section.

integrations.title: Integrations
integrations.description: Connect external services like Blackbaud to sync data with your organization.

permissions.feedDescription: Control which roles can create posts in the Feed.
permissions.discussionDescription: Control which roles can create threads in Discussions.
permissions.jobDescription: Control which roles can post jobs in the Jobs board.
permissions.mediaDescription: Control which roles can upload media to Media.

linkedin.title: LinkedIn Profile Sync
linkedin.description: Allow members to refresh their LinkedIn employment data. When enabled, members can manually sync up to 2 times per month, and a quarterly bulk sync runs automatically for all members with a LinkedIn URL.
linkedin.adminOnly: Only admins can change this setting.

errors.noAccess: You do not have access to this organization.
errors.adminOnlyLanguage: Only admins can change the default language.

feedback.thankYouDesc: We appreciate you taking the time to help us improve.
feedback.whatBlockedPlaceholder: Tell us what got in your way, confused you, or didn't work as expected...

app.noOrgsDesc: Create a new organization or join one you were invited to.

app.accessRevoked: Your access to this organization has been revoked. Please contact an admin if you believe this is an error.
app.pendingApprovalDesc: Your request to join {org} is pending admin approval. You'll be able to access it once approved.

invites.approvalNote: Approval is required — new members who use this invite will need admin approval before gaining access.

invites.deleteParentConfirm: Delete this parent invite link? Anyone who already joined will keep access.

donations.amountRequired: Enter a donation amount greater than zero.
donations.stripeNotEnabled: Stripe donations are not enabled yet. Ask an admin to connect Stripe.
donations.intentCreated: Donation intent created. Complete payment via Stripe.
donations.hideDonorNamesDescription: When enabled, donor names are hidden from members. Only admins and editors can see who donated.

linkedin.oidcNote: You signed in with LinkedIn, but profile sync still requires a separate LinkedIn connection for reusable OAuth tokens.

googleCalendar.title: Google Calendar Sync
googleCalendar.description: Automatically sync {orgName}'s events to your personal Google Calendar. Games, meetings, socials, and more — always up to date.
